word: G5567 - ψάλλω - psállō - psal'-lo - Make melody

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
2. to cause to vibrate by touching, to twang

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Probably strengthened from ψάω psaō (to rub or touch the surface; compare G5597); to twitch or twang, that is, to play on a stringed instrument (celebrate the divine worship with music and accompanying odes): - make melody, sing (psalms).
